REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Archmage (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).

→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:4+6=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:11+6=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
